economic_notes: First Nation holds 51% share in a joint venture for various construction projects. Consolidated entities include Mehkana Development Corporation, Wasagamack Wass Mart, Wasagamack Bulk Fuel, and Atchitamo Development Inc. Major capital projects underway including Manitoba School Initiative, CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative, and various band housing units.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 but audit report dated November 15, 2024 — significant delay in audit completion. Seven consolidated entities included. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Community services expenses of $14,235,285 likely includes major capital/infrastructure project activity. Construction in progress of $14,444,899 on balance sheet (down from $73,158,023 prior year due to transfer to tangible capital assets — Buildings increased by ~$74M). Prior year net assets were positive $1,790,381; current year net debt is $3,483,174. Debt forgiveness of $676,096 and joint venture income of $600,000 appear in budget column only, not in actuals.
